message:
rich_rust-a62: verify and fix Style parsing edge cases

- Create comprehensive test suite (56 tests) for Style::parse()
- Fix bug: BLINK2, FRAME, ENCIRCLE attributes were silently ignored
  during parsing due to catch-all match arm
- Test all valid inputs: empty, none, attributes, colors, hex, rgb,
  color(n), hyperlinks, short aliases, case insensitivity
- Test all invalid inputs: unknown keywords, incomplete on/not/link,
  invalid hex/rgb formats, out-of-range color numbers
- Test behavior: duplicate attributes, two foregrounds, set then not
- Test traits: FromStr, TryFrom, From<Color>, Add operators

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
